introSection: Pikajuna (lit. 'Express') is a powered roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Finland. It was known as City Express during 1990–2003 seasons, but when Linnanmäki started a new naming policy in 2004, using only Finnish names for its rides, the ride was renamed Pikajuna. Pikajuna means "Express Train" in Finnish.
fullText: Pikajuna (lit. 'Express') is a powered roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Finland. It was known as City Express during 1990–2003 seasons, but when Linnanmäki started a new naming policy in 2004, using only Finnish names for its rides, the ride was renamed Pikajuna. Pikajuna means "Express Train" in Finnish.
